blended.narrative: Sugar Bowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
